codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly provides two-layer file safety validation (prefix check + canonicalize) for ReadFileTool, WriteFileTool, and FileEditTool. All three tools now validate paths before access, and symlink escape attacks are prevented via std::fs::canonicalize(). Five unit tests verify the behavior.

summary: Feature PASSED review. Implementation correctly implements two-layer file safety validation with (1) prefix check on raw path and (2) canonicalize check to detect symlink escapes. ReadFileTool, WriteFileTool, and FileEditTool all use this pattern. Five tests verify symlink escape prevention. Clippy clean. 452 tests pass.
